user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sarah Bertrand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_otwhBw94I1tz2fU7-oCazeDo0ZVYCNxJGDcV8oWdejmyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Maclauchlan Contracting is my go-to crew for exterior work. They’ve installed siding, asphalt and steel roofing, flashing, and eavestrough on multiple properties for me, and they’re consistently reliable from start to finish. Communication is clear, timelines are realistic, and the workmanship is clean and professional. They show up when they say they will, take pride in the details, and leave the site tidy. If you want a contractor you can trust and call again (and again), I highly recommend Maclauchlan Contracting!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melissa Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIF_J4t83DEy8Uf58TYZtWNVV20tYqgtWlnhvDxZrxrmIXfag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just wanted to give a HUGE THANK YOU to  Mitch Maclauchlan with Maclauchlan contracting for a fantastic job with taking our our chimney, repairing & reshingling our roof! Mitch and his crew are incredible! Great attention to detail, patiently answered all our questions, taking pictures and keeping us informed all along the way!  (He was also Cheaper than the 3 other quotes that I got from other companies!!)
When complete...  Mitch came back twice to SWEPT THE DRIVEWAY to ensure all debris was cleaned!
If you are planning to get your roof redone..  Mitch is the man!  Dependable, honest, thorough describes the team!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKuteCxAE&fid=0x0:0xc0335bf032f15823"],"When":"2021-4-2"},{"Name":"Megan Skelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTuhtZG5SL4UN43h42F_qQ90gV5F6TXtnP7sVqgm6Iu7pXLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mitch and his team did amazing work for us. They were very professional, and we’re very pleased with the finished product. The workers were all very courteous, they even cleaned our gutters for us. After finishing and seeing that we had a dog, they also use a magnet to ensure no nails or pieces of metal would be left in the back yard. I highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICuioqxnAE&fid=0x0:0xc0335bf032f15823"],"When":"2022-7-25"},{"Name":"Marie Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUai1mImYpIXf5nVkO_ZVwgRMI2Nk5-9mre4m4G80Qn3egiJFC8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were really impressed with MacLauchlan Contracting. The crew was friendly, showed up on time, and cleaned everything up when they were done. The roof looks awesome. We’d definitely recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"melissa randle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWHY0pREpT1L3bYW_qAuK9xjzM5JZzZm72v7XpWmEi07mZxXKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"100% recommend! They will be back for our next job for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICasOGr2gE&fid=0x0:0xc0335bf032f15823"],"When":"2021-7-21"},{"Name":"Dave McGregor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUbOx3N8VpIwyYGITI6BiX-E7d1j7qV8JqHkfdROSUvr7dVM7W3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely reliable and professional roofing company in Kingston. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jo-Anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyJKXjLc2cCc9adDSuzWfsuHkHLVmlH0MU6D294Z7xaNcOY9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mitch and his team were extremely responsive to my request for some gutter repairs. I highly recommend Maclauchlan Contracting.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dale Marecak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRKX671-prO1iWRp32DlM-dgtg8VImMbF7eTz6ZME6KbuQX1k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mitch and his team did a wonderful, quality job reshingling our roof, at a very competitive price. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Chris Deschamps","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8dzdw1gu9TdAEIm0QGA4qmNx8dproMHWFOWJUrdpYIv9Odw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had hired another company through Tarion to replace our deck. It had been condemned less than a year after moving into our new home. The company we hired tore down the existing deck and caused damage to our pump and well line. They also indicated they couldn’t complete the contract as they didn’t have access to helical piles which was required due to the water table of outer property.\nParadise Construction was recommended and we spoke to Kristian who spoke with us about wants and needs with a site visit. Shortly after meeting the work begun and we were excited to finally see progress. Within a few months, our deck was competed with  a 30’ section being covered and finished with a fan any lighting system. Brandon\u003c Jeremy, and Kaylib were great to deal with on a daily basis. They were polite and listened to our concerns and solicited feedback when required. Without hesitation, i would recommend them for their professionalism, knowledge and finished product. We will be utilizing them in the future for another project we have planned.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID94rb22QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x826ec393a4a9e9ba"],"When":"2024-3-14"},{"Name":"Cathy Seymour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJn2aW_jbMw0lJnFB5Xl1gkqymwxbNvC51eiVf3OMqK-FpehA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paradise Construction helped with our kitchen. They installed new flooring, fixed the insulation and gave us a beautiful fireplace. Here are the before and after pictures. They were professionally, completed the job on time and within budget","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIlr-jDw\u0026fid=0x0:0x826ec393a4a9e9ba"],"When":"2025-4-1"},{"Name":"Sara Virgo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh0sJQ9v8qzSOHDK72j97PfVknb2kGM-IBaRx6jHz5CybdEGf6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had them do a washroom that I had designed. Their work was very good, impeccable in fact, but unfortunately, the communication between the different parties left to be desired. Things were ordered only when they came up as being needed, causing unnecessary delays. Walls were closed before the electrical work was completed. And some plumbing that could have been moved to a better place (exterior hose) just got covered up and an access hatch had to be added instead. Their workers left all their tools and their mess (work and personal) in the middle of the recreation room next to the washroom so when the job dragged on, I had to clean it up myself to reclaim the space.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDByZfoiAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x826ec393a4a9e9ba"],"When":"2023-1-22"},{"Name":"Anne Douglas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxdy390vWoGhqTlAtb5Dg4y5RlWdryTjHF1G9K12COFlzUCPb3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent work! We've had Paradise Construction complete a few projects over the last few years including a deck, pergola, finishing our basement, and renovating our laundry room. Kristian and his team show up reliably and work efficiently, always cleaning up after themselves. We will be using them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Cawkwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyfBDJicZC5WsIUKkK1nEwC4Ol3sZZqAIzcFzFkzGDnzbE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paradise construction provided excellent service with respect to the construction of a wooden fence and a steel roof.  They were very willing to incorporate our design requirements into the completed project.  In addition, they addressed all outstanding issues in a timely and professional matter.  The final product was outstanding.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristiane Lafond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHMAdEI5EkpnlCFifxkcTRCfoefVrFI_6YbhIiYrFCp273iec=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paradise Construction was the most responsive construction company that we reached out to. They were able to complete our project surprisingly fast! The quote provided before hand was very comprehensive. Due to the age of our house, some unforeseen issues arose and options were discussed with us promptly. We are very pleased with the quality of work and professionalism Paradise displayed. Would recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alina Achim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRHAI9lXvsjCtKnDhljJE3RP03_CYuF2VXHB1bcRVa_aXavUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paradise Construction built us a brand new garage in 2021 and did a great job. They were able to honour a quote they provided us with prior to lumber prices skyrocketing that year, which meant a lot to us. The quality of the work is great and everyone we dealt with was kind and understanding. Would definitely recommend them to our friends and family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B. A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBkIhf-e0SDwebvlfJdjIFlRNx_VBqSDiVMgWiidH0Gcp6ECoV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Working with the team at Paradise Construction has been a pleasure from the very first phone call. Not only has communication always been professional and timely, but their intent is clearly to be transparent and honest with their clients at all times. For a first time home builder, the process was laid out to us in a thoughtful and organized manner so that \"next steps\" were clearly explained - no question was ever too much trouble to answer. When we needed an engineer for drawings and a company to complete a survey, Paradise took care to connect us with trustworthy professionals.  The staff at Paradise are clearly committed to maintaining a very high level of integrity, open conversation, efficiency, and accessibility.  We would very much recommend them to anyone building a custom home, not only for all of the above reasons, but they are clearly knowledgeable and highly skilled at the job they obviously pride themselves in doing to the highest standard possible.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jerome Slater","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCT3R5A3Q1bKD82gqrfAnV17Omafj3UdKjIuuzwhpL0zt4dWuu-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In July 2025, we paid a significant deposit to WS Exteriors for a full exterior remodel originally scheduled for August. After multiple delays, our original point of contact stopped responding.
We were able to reach the owner, who committed to a November start with a new crew. That crew removed the siding from our home, left partway through the day, and never returned. A trailer was left on our property, and repeated attempts to reach the company were unsuccessful.
With winter approaching and the work abandoned, we were forced to file a credit card dispute and hire another contractor.
This experience was extremely stressful, and I strongly recommend avoiding this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYD-2X7ODkhWBoCJBcDL8_&fid=0x0:0xe9d94a1e2903e41b"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"daniel armstrong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLV06-Z2U49T8XAxWH5viW8zpwrGycH8I7TDY-fRyrciv-gIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My girlfriend Wendy Strickland recently hired Wiskin Exteriors to install new siding on her house..I am happy to say that they did an EXCELLENT job..Especially Chris Boulter and his team as they were very professional, knowledgeable and quick to please..Chris treated her house like his own..He returned a couple of times to fix a few small issues promptly ..I would 100% HIGHLY RECOMMEND Wiskin Exteriors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICT-9ic0AE&fid=0x0:0xe9d94a1e2903e41b"],"When":"2024-5-19"},{"Name":"John Screech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPQVWnV87FTIu1fFPk6txKNlAE6c3AtYMmXfoCnlPNG3AP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Wiskin (WS Exteriors) did a pretty good job of re-siding our house.  Owner came out and compiled a list of minor defects with the job (which impressed me) THEN VANISHED!  Maybe six months later one of the guys showed up at the house asking my wife for “the Defect list” while I was travelling for work. She told him to contact Mike….  Crickets since then!  Wish I’d held back $10K or so to get some attention from these guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy Strickland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeKuZ7tNdWf-1Uj0Yei_3Rl1zU36FnrIIviBp3Pzsoy7_4AghM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wiskin Exteriors resided my home recently. Manager Steve Condie in the office was easy to reach and quick to respond. Ahmed at reception was also very friendly, welcoming and quick to help us when needed. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Owen Bird","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-ousI-2d2LakFxb-5HCbiyZ80U8kwq9dr44xKY5YWgb77NNU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nathan came highly recommended and did not disappoint.  We had a bad leak and he got up on the roof and tarped it in the pouring rain.  He and his crew came back that weekend and worked tirelessly ripping off someone else's shotty work and replaced it fully.  I'm quite surprised to see the other reviews  and can only comment on my experience which was flawless.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cheryl Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJJ8IqvaNvVVgCLW1LoVI8IKxEUYOpuHSmBUguuG0yYIRBKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"BUYER BEWARE!! In March 2018, I hired Over the Top to replace the roof on my home. At first, I thought they did a great job. The work was completed quickly and looked nice. Fast forward to the spring of 2022 and my roof is now leaking. According to my invoice, and their website (which no longer exists), they offer a 20 year warranty and a satisfaction guarantee.  So, I called the company and left 3 voicemail messages with no reply. I then sent a text, an email, and a Facebook message. Nathan replied to my email saying he’d have a crew at my house the next week. No one showed. After a follow-up email, and a phone call, someone came and looked at the roof and I was told the chimney needs new flashing. Despite me telling Nathan that the leak was on the opposite side of the house and that, unless water can flow against gravity, the leak has nothing to do with the chimney, he sent someone to install new flashing around the chimney. The workmanship on the new flashing is shoddy to say the least and it looks terrible. Not only does it look terrible, but, as I expected, it didn’t fix the problem. The roof is still leaking! It’s been leaking now for so long that it’s caused water damage to the drywall and cupboards in my kitchen too! On July 28th, I sent an email informing Nathan that the new flashing did not fix the problem and that my roof was still leaking. No response. I sent a follow up email on August 29th. No response. It’s been 4 months since I first contacted Over the Top about the leak. It is now September 26th, we’re heading into fall/winter, and my roof is still leaking! Do not hire this company to do any work for you! They do not stand behind their workmanship, despite their guarantee.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nina H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnZEWT0SCIMZvewBISxWD0mrPqHIbhy5FFirSDiDlsaf4Mhndc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I called Over the Top for some warranty work because I had an old vent that was leaking. The guy told me he would stop by later in the day, and never showed up. I called him in the afternoon, no answer. I called again the next day, no answer. He never showed up and isn't answering his phone. Would not recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXxvtBg-CagVmkmpHUeDFTNcnPzGEGQzIZPAQi_sRrKLNNug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I spoke with them to get an estimate. The eavestrough business seems as hit-and-miss as that of roofing, at least in Kingston.  A few good firms and many mediocre ones. The first challenge is to even have someone answer your request for a quote, or even call back.  It took a couple of weeks for Norm Truscott, owner of Exterior Specialist, to get around to do a quote and show me his product but he did.  The quote, provided within a day or two, was reasonable so the work was booked.  It took several weeks for the crew to do the work but that was made clear by Norm - he has a lot of work these days.  The four-man crew, led by Norm's son Jim, was clearly very proficient and did a very job of installing with minimal disruption. Jim walked around with me so that there would be no surprises.  He made several good recommendations. Ours being a fairly large single family home, they were done in five hours.  Norm came by the check on things at the end. title: BELFOR Property Restoration
address: 1507 John Counter Blvd, Kingston, ON K7M 7J3
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Colinda Carroll","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJv2KBUdRDwudL_G4NCFeSeJdZ28aZ8VEiDq1LZk-Hmb_DcHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am extremely dissatisfied with the level of professionalism and service provided by this company. Following a fire at my business, my insurance carrier retained Belfor to assess the damage and to perform a temporary repair to my front door in order to prevent further exposure to weather until a permanent door and frame could be installed.

Despite being advised on three separate occasions that the repair would be completed, no work was performed. Over a period of approximately one and a half weeks, Belfor failed to appear as scheduled and provided no advance notice, phone call, or written communication to explain the missed appointments.

As a direct result of this failure, I arrived at my business after a recent snowstorm to find snow inside the premises, causing additional and entirely preventable exposure and damage.

I spoke to  Belfor by telephone at approximately 9:00 a.m. today and formally raised these concerns. Although I expected a return call or follow-up, none was provided.

This matter reflects a lack of reliability, communication, and reasonable care in addressing an urgent post-loss situation. I would strongly caution others to consider alternative providers if given the option.
Very unreliable, unprofessional and incompetent. 😡","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shootout Fishing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyZu5OEY7z-8_Y47c15XW9WgQjytqZSECYcK0U1o1puAnpXtRO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I had to select at least one star. My pick would be 0 stars for This company. Rude arrogant “project manager” and regional manager doesn’t return calls. Thank goodness I got them out before stating the job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nic McKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkDHl88FoAljsjcW2ujsQYmxmp86Ju8mzaMXOH9KWCawjgEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Truly horrible service. Restoration from a flood was quoted several weeks, and has now dragged on for 8 months.
Decisions made by the crews were not discussed with us beforehand.
The house still is not fully completed, and their manager or ‘leader’ never returns our calls or shows up to scheduled meetings.
This is beyond ridiculous.
The house is a disaster…everything is coated in drywall dust, paint drips all over the new flooring, dirty hand prints left on new doors and walls, closet doors aren’t aligned properly… we’ve given up and started cleaning ourselves.
Horrible team, awful communication, super unprofessional.
Avoid them any chance you get.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samira Hriech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwjQ2NG1KIBQ9cFgFUUZpMItVWRsbBL2wd0dWLsFJMymeIDYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’m honestly astounded by how little care and efficiency has gone into repairing my parents’ house. A job that was originally quoted for 6 weeks of work and we’re now deep into 8 months. My parents are in their 60s and still working full time and I’ve honestly felt only anxiety and unease for them for how long it’s been since they’ve been able to go to their own home at the end of a long day and tuck into their own beds. The work is taking an outrageously long time, every step is drawn out, and no one ever responds to my parents in anything resembling a reasonable amount of time. In one example my parents changed the floor selection to one that wasn’t on back order to save a couple weeks of waiting to only end up not having the floor put down for over a month anyways. While I understand that not everything can be repaired to be exactly as it was, some of the choices made to try are just way out there and are incomprehensibly impractical. Over 8 months later and they are dragging their feet to just finish final things, clean up, and unpack. It’s hard to put into polite words how messed up this is. It’s now a long weekend and we’ve given up and started doing some of this stuff ourselves. Disgusting how little care is being afforded to an integral part of our lives. If anyone else’s insurance company says they’re going to send Belfor, I suggest requesting someone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yulia Kovaleva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWC7LVKXn6Myajl-q9NSRNiMD31W8oZAgWPgFAVU1Ys3C-FONGt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a roof shingle blow off our house and as a result during heavy rain, some of the water leaked from our attic into our house. Insurance was able to get someone to fix the shingle on the roof; however when Belfor came, they said the ceiling repair in the room where the leak happened, was covered by the "emergency repair". Turns out, they lied to us - it was not covered by the emergency repair, so they billed our insurance,  drilled multiple holes in our ceiling, never came back to fix it, and left a mess both times the workers were here. Never called back or bothered to even check. As a result, our insurance is going to go up now because they billed the insurance for the work that was never done.

Scam of a business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet Purchase","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIb-SvgupeUmOlp-BPr-xTTNLr3fD0HbpuGrs-vPhVPkCX3tQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My condo unit was flooded and Belfor restoration was called in by my Insurance company.
Jackie and Gina have been amazing! Removing flooring, hauling multiple massive humidifiers and fans, moving furniture including my built in king size wooden bed to get at the flooring under the bed. Explaining everything.
We’re not done yet but I have great confidence in this crew.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristin Loewen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIbjSknF0jZlmQc-HXsDi1Dg3gQsLDwZRi9cuWqfX30KJ08v6x=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently was involved in a claim at my home that required me to live elsewhere. It was a very hard season, but Belfor was assigned as the restoration team to help with the repairs. I can't say enough good things about the team - Ausif, Doug, Emily and the whole team at Belfor were to helpful and accommodating. They took the time to make me feel like a priority. They kept me up to date to ease my mind through the whole process. The updates they made were done so well and in a quick process. They even looked after things that were definitely out of thier scope of operations. Truly the customer service level was unmatched. Even issues with contractors were looked after so I would not have to worry. I am so thankful to have been able to work with this team and even though i hope I never go through a claim process again, I would happily choose them to do any renovations in my home. Thank you so much for your hard work team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynn Varma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCIgi0hkoMQdkFEsIn-RZagDZNer4WmiPlIra6_NbJdmALpTviVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am writing to you to express my sincere gratitude for excellent service provided by Kaila Bennett. She was the project manager and provided outstanding efficiency and communication. She was readily available for all questions and surpassed expectations. She went above and beyond in assisting me with answering questions that were difficult, liaising with the insurance adjuster when he was not responding to me, meeting me at the property at request to walk through and view some outstanding issues etc etc etc. I can't say enough about how appreciative I am of her service. Peace of mind is key with these systems.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carson Healey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrk9TkxCampEdAwXifC1Ze8jV3fkLpC5Q9xbhUkTOBUAd_ZQa8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We couldn’t be happier with our new solar panels! Sarah and Rick were incredibly professional and friendly, and they walked us through every step of the process with clear and prompt communication.  They were extremely generous with their time, making sure we made educated decisions along the way, particularly about the type of panels we purchased and their placement, and answered our many, many questions.   They even provided us with the contact details of another customer, who answered more of our questions and graciously showed us her setup before we decided to go for it.  The installation of our solar panels was incredibly quick and tidy.  We’re already seeing savings on our energy bill, and it feels great to know we made a smart, sustainable investment.  I highly recommend Quantum to anyone considering solar!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimberly McGrath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgJKky-9Amq_JV0BaJjmU-4VbwprnddbHW6h4trfOV6Pr6ni7j=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rick, Sarah and the crew all provide wonderful service. They are very knowledgeable, prompt, efficient and caring. The crew even coordinated with our roofing company when we changed our roof to ensure that we had minimal downtime as we are completely off-grid. We have availed ourselves of their services and expertise multiple times now over the past 6 years and we always receive excellent service and advice from them. I definitely recommend hiring them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cam Mather","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO_o7_YXKriXgiJvCNbebInP53uWSOVS39HOHTey0wZDb_oe3T=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently upgraded our off-grid battery bank from Surrette lead-acid batteries, to Volthium lithium-ion batteries. Rick at Quantum has been a key part of our continuous quality improvement of our off-grid power system, the batteries were no different. As the batteries were declining I was in regular communication with Rick about the price differential. Recently the price/performance of lithium-ion was finally at a par or a bit better than the lead acid, and we had Rick install the new batteries. The crew was extremely efficient and knowledgeable with resetting our solar charge controllers. We also have a wind turbine and since lithium-ion batteries should not be overcharged, they were able to adjust the wind charge controller to ensure this didn’t happen. The new batteries are performing well beyond our expectations and like all our experiences with Quantum Energy, we are extremely grateful to have such a knowledgeable partner in all our upgrades. We can’t recommend Rick and his outstanding team enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Mather","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmi6V3ykoE8NRIFHkkoOksz_ojuCGFaP8jCMG1ntkyZ73F_KRM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When we moved off-grid 26 years ago we had to do everything ourselves. We’ve seen countless dealers come and go, but Rick Rooney at Quantum Renewable Energy has been around for\nmore than 20 years because he does great work. Rick has now been involved with numerous upgrades of our system. In our most recent project Rick’s crew removed the old panels from our solar tracker, installed new more efficient ones, and reprogrammed our charge controllers to ensure optimal performance. Oh, and they cleaned up the work area before they left. We could save a few dollars ordering equipment online and doing it ourselves, but we want to ensure that we maximize every potential available kilowatt, and I have complete confidence that Rick will recommend the best option and install it properly and efficiently. I have recommended Rick to numerous other people and everyone has been extremely happy with him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Craig Goldie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-oN2n3_QJqCbJrlQjo9OLbkg3geUskDxzSdchvBk2LCOvo1a1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quantum has been excellent; I have solar pool heaters and PV solar panels from them. Cost, quotes, installation and after care (including proactively identifying and managing a hardware issue with replacement and reinstallation without me needing to even notify them) has been absolutely great. Amazing communication. They're a great and professional team. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kerry Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSC7tgjPLe5yWLNkJ-sEaU7QV19GBoBq_Ccg0WxuzSK_oiRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In early October 2024 we asked Quantum Renewable to estimate the solar voltaic system we would need to cover the energy we currently use.  We had Quantum install a solar water heater on our roof in 2010.  It has provided us with hot water for more than six months per year with no problems.  On very short notice they removed it for a roofing job and reinstalled it promptly.  For the photovoltaics, Quantum dealt with all of the paperwork required for permits from the City and Hydro One.  Our system was completed, with all inspections, and running at the end of October!  Already we are covering most of our energy usage, even in the less sunny days of fall.  This time last year we used an average of 44 kWh per day.  Since operating, our solar panels have generated about 32 kWh daily over the past five days (Oct 30 - Nov 3).  We are so excited to be contributing to the greening of our community.  We highly recommend Quantum Renewable Energy to do this important work for you!","Images":null,"When":""}]

We approached several companies for quotes in January/February to re-shingle the roof and put plywood down underneath. We contacted DM Roofing, who was recommended to me by several co-workers.

We chose DM Roofing for a number of reasons:
1. Their competitive quote
2. The timeline they could get the work done (far and away the best timeline of anyone we reached out to)
3. Friendliness
4. Prompt and professional responses

Darren was able to cut me a deal on the shingles and plywood and gave me a further discount on the remaining unused shingles, which we are planning to use for our shed.

The actual work was really well done. Everyone I spoke to on site were very nice and considerate of our property. They finished most of the work by the time I got home and returned the second day only because they ran out of cap for the edges.

After the work was done, we asked them to cut out an area for a plumbing vent (for a future project), which they did for us with no issue.

I really appreciated every step of the process with Darren and his team. I would recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanne Revell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQ-IRfPUrPBIjDOlHI5q50Dtny29lbIA91Z2wqKWpnmdp54g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had this company re-shingle my roof. I highly recommend this company for your roofs. Thank you","Images":null,"When":""}]

Called 3 or 4 companies for an emergency repair. Amherst Roofing was the first to respond so we went ahead. Rate was $85/hour for 2 men (total of $170 + taxes per hour).  Our bill was for almost $10,000, of which $2500 was for materials. I called to complain and the owner explained that I was paying for the workers to drive to get materials. That's almost $200 per hour (with taxes) for 2 guys to run back and forth for materials.
To be reasonable, let's assume that 2 men worked 6 hours per day on site for 4 days = 48 hours. (They did not work that many  hours...We were home. The first day, two men were here for about 2-1/2 hours, then left for materials and didn't return that day. The same sort of thing happened the 2nd day... two men for a few hours than gone.)
There was no breakdown of costs whatsoever on the bill...nothing to say how many hours were spent on site; no description of the work done; no list of materials.
To be reasonable, let's assume that 2 men worked 6 hours per day on site for 4 days = 48 hours. The bill was for 76 hours. That means that they charged for 2 men for 9-1/2 hours per day for 4 days.
Now I recently called them back because the problem was not 100% resolved. They arrived, looked up and agreed there was something not quite right. Let's say that visit lasted 30 minutes.
